series_metadata.series_title: Liquor Control Consent to Sell Beer or Intoxicating Liquor
series_metadata.series_description: Division may consent to to a person to sell beer or spirituous liquor under certain circumstances, pursuant to O.R.C. Section 4301.29. These records are the letters documenting these Consents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
